====Pokémon====
{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Brassius
|pkmn=Petilil
|gender=female
|type1=Grass
|img=Brassius Petilil Adventures.png
|epnum=PASV09
|epname=Challenge! The Avant-Garde Gym Leader!!
|desc={{p|Petilil}} is Brassius's first known Pokémon. She was first used to battle {{Scarlet}}'s {{p|Tarountula}}, but her attempt to put it to sleep was foiled by Tarountula's {{a|Insomnia}}. She was then taken out by a single {{m|Bug Bite}}.

Petilil's only known move is {{m|Sleep Powder}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Brassius
|pkmn=Smoliv
|type1=Grass
|type2=Normal
|img=Brassius Smoliv Adventures.png
|img_size=160px
|epnum=PASV09
|epname=Challenge! The Avant-Garde Gym Leader!!
|desc={{p|Smoliv}} is Brassius's second known Pokémon. It was used to battle {{Scarlet}}'s {{p|Tarountula}}. Despite using a {{m|Sunny Day}}-{{m|Weather Ball}} combination to deal super effective damage to Tarountula, it wasn't enough to defeat the {{pkmn|category|String Ball Pokémon}}, who retaliated and defeated Smoliv.

Smoliv's known moves are {{m|Sunny Day}} and {{m|Weather Ball}}.}}

{{anchor|Sudowoodo 2}}{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Brassius
|pkmn=Sudowoodo
|tera=Grass
|type1=Rock
|img=Brassius Sudowoodo Adventures.png
|img_size=120px
|cap=Brassius's Sudowoodo
|img2=Brassius Terastallized Sudowoodo Adventures.png
|img2_size=120px
|cap2=Brassius's Terastallized Sudowoodo
|epnum=PASV09
|epname=Challenge! The Avant-Garde Gym Leader!!
|desc={{p|Sudowoodo}} is Brassius's third known Pokémon. It is capable of {{Tera}}stallizing into a {{t|Grass}} type. {{Scarlet}} sent out her {{p|Palafin}} to face it, but withdrew it immediately after Sudowoodo had Terastallized and sent out {{p|Armarouge}} instead, which proceeded to strike Sudowoodo with a super effective {{m|Lava Plume}}. Sudowoodo survived the attack due to its Ability, but fell afterward due to the {{status|burn}} it received.

None of Sudowoodo's moves are known and its Ability is {{a|Sturdy}}.}}
